text: Reduce the number of strokes in your Lottie file to significantly decrease file size.
Simplifying complex vector paths can boost your animation's web performance by up to 30%.
Remove invisible layers; Lottie files often carry hidden data that adds unnecessary weight.
Try locking your frame rate (FPS) to 30 to optimize your animation for smoother playback.
Did you know TinyLottie Pro can automatically compress complex layers with a single click?
